    Description
    AutoTacticChecker
    Allows to check that auto tactics seem to work (see bug #779).
    AutoTacticChecker.ExternalTactic
     
    AutoTacticRegistry
    Singleton class implementing the auto tactic registry.
    DeltaProcessor
    Processor for proof tree deltas.

    Messages
     
    Placeholders
    Placeholder implementations of auto tactic descriptor interfaces.
    Placeholders.CombinatorDescriptorPlaceholder
    Tactic combinator descriptor placeholder.
    Placeholders.CombinedTacticDescriptorPlaceholder
    Combined tactic descriptor placeholder.
    Placeholders.ParameterizerPlaceholder
    Tactic parameterizer descriptor placeholder.
    Placeholders.ParameterSettingPlaceholder
    Parameter setting placeholder with custom parameterizer ID.
    Placeholders.ParamTacticDescriptorPlaceholder
    Parameterized tactic descriptor placeholder.
    Placeholders.TacticPlaceholder
    Tactic placeholder with a custom ID.
    ProofDependenciesBuilder
    This is a mutable implementation of IProofDependencies to be used with the intention of collecting dependencies from the internal proof data structures
    ProofRule
     
    ProofRule.Antecedent
     
    ProofTree
    Implementation of a proof tree, with observer design pattern.
    ProofTreeDelta
    Implementation of proof tree deltas.
    ProofTreeIterator
     
    ProofTreeNode
    Implementation of IProofTreeNode
    ProofTreeNode.ProofSkeleton
     
    ProverChecks
    This class contains a collection of static methods that clients can use to check that the input they provide to the sequent prover fulfills the expectations the sequent prover has on them.
    ProverSequent
    This class is the default implementation of the IProverSequent and IInternalProverSequent interfaces.
    ReasonerDesc
    Bridge class used by the reasoner registry to store data about reasoners and provided to clients through its interface.
    ReasonerDesc.DummyReasoner
    Protected helper class implementing dummy reasoners.
    ReasonerDesc.ReasonerLoadingException
     
    ReasonerFailure
     
    ReasonerOutput
     
    ReasonerRegistry
    Singleton class implementing the reasoner registry.
    RecordPrinter
    A class for easier development of toString() methods for debugging purposes.
    RewriteHypAction
    Default implementation of IHypAction.IRewriteHypAction.
    SelectionHypAction
     
    TacticCheckStatus
    Internal implementation of the published interface.
    TacticDescriptors
     
    TacticDescriptors.AbstractTacticDescriptor
    Private helper class implementing lazy loading of tactic instances
    TacticDescriptors.CombinatorDescriptor
     
    TacticDescriptors.CombinedTacticDescriptor
     
    TacticDescriptors.DynamicTacticRef
    Loads the dynamic tactic from the registry upon tactic instance creation.
    TacticDescriptors.DynTacticProviderRef
    Encapsulates a dynamic tactic provider provided by an external plug-in.
    TacticDescriptors.ParameterizerDescriptor
     
    TacticDescriptors.ParamTacticDescriptor
     
    TacticDescriptors.TacticDescriptor
     
    TacticDescriptors.UninstantiableTacticDescriptor
     
    TypeChecker
    Encapsulates all the verifications to be made to ensure that a rule can safely be applied to a sequent in terms of well-formedness and type-checking.
    Util
    Class grouping various utility functions, which are intended for internal use only (never published).
    Util.NullProofMonitor
     
    VersionedIdCodec
    Utility class that manages the encoding and decoding of a reasoner id with the version of the reasoner.
